user_prompt: Critical: Leman Russ battle tank requires an operation
prayer:
Approach the mighty Leman Russ battle tank with reverence, beseeching the Omnissiah to guide our hands.
Anoint its adamantium hull and rumbling engine with sacred oils to rouse the dormant Machine Spirit.
Commence the operation upon the Leman Russ battle tank, intoning the Litany of Mechanical Restoration.
Purge any heretekal corruptions from its auspex arrays and targeting cogitators.
Verify the Leman Russ battle tank's vitality through diagnostic rites, praising the Motive Force eternal.

user_prompt: Consecrate the transuranic arquebus before startup
prayer:
Kneel before the transuranic arquebus, invoking the Omnissiah's wrath upon xenos foes.
Recite the Canticle of Startup to awaken the Machine Spirit within the transuranic arquebus.
Align its flux conduits and consecrate the barrel with blessed rad-philters.
Initiate the startup sequence, monitoring exotic particle flows with auspex vigilance.
Sanctify the transuranic arquebus fully, that it may unleash annihilation unerring.

Present thyself unto the flux-unit, offering binary supplications to the Machine Spirits.
Anoint its gyroscopic sensors with sacred lubricants for precise targeting.
Invoke the Rite of Recalibration upon the flux-unit, aligning warp-displacement fields.
Engage targeting protocols, beseeching the Omnissiah for unerring accuracy.
Confirm the flux-unit's harmony through noospheric diagnostics.

Test its manipulatory precision with ritual grasping of sanctified tools.
Seal the utility mechadendrite's service with the Seal of the Omnissiah.
